prompt_text:
### Demographics: 60-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 8 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Fibrosis
Body mass index category: Overweight
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Major Depressive Disorder
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Fibrosis; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~20 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Liraglutide 1.8mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 81.7 kg; Height 182.2 cm; BMI 24.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 139/76 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.7%; 9 months ago 7.4%; 6 months ago 7.3%; 3 months ago 7.0%; current 7.2%), FPG (12 months ago 194mg/dL; 9 months ago 170mg/dL; 6 months ago 147mg/dL; 3 months ago 151mg/dL; current 174mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 79.7kg; 9 months ago 79.8kg; 6 months ago 79.9kg; 3 months ago 76.3kg; current 81.7kg), Height (12 months ago 182.2cm; 9 months ago 182.2cm; 6 months ago 182.2cm; 3 months ago 182.2cm; current 182.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 23.0kg/m²; current 24.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 145mmHg; 9 months ago 139mmHg; 6 months ago 139mmHg; 3 months ago 139mmHg; current 139mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 74mmHg; 9 months ago 76mmHg; 6 months ago 76mmHg; 3 months ago 75mmHg; current 76mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 91U/L; 9 months ago 91U/L; 6 months ago 84U/L; 3 months ago 82U/L; current 91U/L), AST (12 months ago 104U/L; 9 months ago 104U/L; 6 months ago 103U/L; 3 months ago 101U/L; current 105U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 6.7mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 5.5mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 4.7mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 3.7mL/min/1.73m²; current 4mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 815mg/g; 9 months ago 586mg/g; 6 months ago 566mg/g; 3 months ago 829mg/g; current 586mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 95mg/dL; 9 months ago 97mg/dL; 6 months ago 92mg/dL; 3 months ago 96mg/dL; current 93mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 42mg/dL; 9 months ago 38mg/dL; 6 months ago 41mg/dL; 3 months ago 38mg/dL; current 40mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 108mg/dL; 9 months ago 108mg/dL; 6 months ago 123mg/dL; 3 months ago 122mg/dL; current 114mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.2g/dL; 3 months ago 11.9g/dL; current 11.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
